driver_subject: scsi: RDMA/srp: Use scsi_cmd_to_rq() instead of scsi_cmnd.request
kernel_subject: scsi: core: Introduce the scsi_cmd_to_rq() function
stage1_reason: Single commit replaces direct access to scsi_cmnd.request with scsi_cmd_to_rq() function, indicating API change adaptation
stage2_reason: Driver commit directly adapts to new scsi_cmd_to_rq() API introduced by kernel commit 51f3a4788928, which adds the function that driver now uses instead of direct scsi_cmnd.request access.
